location: A random drop (roughly a 2% base chance) from spear-wielding Messmer Soldiers found at enemy camps across Scadu Altus. A reliable farming spot is the camp just west of the Moorth Ruins Site of Grace, where three spear-wielding soldiers patrol together.
tactics: This is a random enemy drop, not a fixed pickup — only the spear-wielding Messmer Soldiers (not the sword or other variants) can drop it.
The camp west of the Moorth Ruins Site of Grace has three spear-wielding soldiers together, making it an efficient farming loop.
Rest at Moorth Ruins and return repeatedly to respawn the soldiers for more attempts.
Equip an item-discovery talisman like the Silver Scarab to speed up the grind.
lore: Standard-issue equipment of the rank-and-file soldiers in Messmer's army, this is a well-worn steel-bladed greatspear built for relentless assault — its heavy attacks can be charged into a flurry of consecutive strikes suited to overwhelming a line of enemies.

builds.name: Quality Great Spear
builds.why: Even D/D scaling in Strength and Dexterity rewards a balanced quality build, and its reach plus multi-hit charged attack suit straightforward melee play.

builds.name: Infusion Flex Build
builds.why: It's one of only two Great Spears that can take an Ashes of War affinity, letting you reslot it into Keen, Blood, Occult, or other builds.
